response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and a proven ability to architect scalable systems, there is a fundamental mismatch with core role requirements. His C++ experience is limited to 6 months in 2014–2015; his career has diverged significantly toward TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies over the past decade. The role demands deep C++ expertise, industrial automation domain knowledge, and Secure Development Lifecycle / IEC 62443 standards compliance—none of which are evident. His background is web and cloud-native, not embedded systems or industrial control.
strengths: 19 years of software development experience with proven ability to architect performant, scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, testing practices (TDD), and mentoring, with active open-source contributions and community engagement
Demonstrated React and Node.js expertise, plus experience with distributed, event-driven platforms that align with cloud technology exposure
concerns: C++ experience limited to 6 months at National Instruments (2014–2015); primary recent focus on TypeScript/Node.js moves away from the core language requirement
No demonstrated background in industrial automation, manufacturing platforms, IoT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA, DNP 3.0)
No mention of Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL), IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity standards, or application security practices critical to the role

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation / IoT domain experience missing
Software architecture and scalability track record
